title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at ID Fresh Food Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at ID Fresh Food Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ID Fresh Food Holdings Services! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Mysuru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ID Fresh Food Holdings Services:
ID Fresh Food Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ID Fresh Food Holdings Services!
